lastTask: Added mandatory agent behavior rules to CLAUDE.md: Decision Framework (5 options for every architectural decision), Communication Style (plain language, phone-readable), Standing Permission (auto-merge new rules). Fixed recurring git sync pattern: after every MCP push, run git fetch origin <branch> && git reset --hard origin/<branch>.
